description: Special dialogue tree for confronting Marcus before the final battle. Allows players with his journals to make him flee.

introduction: *A tall figure in dark robes steps forward from the shadows*
*His eyes glow with unnatural light*
More fools come to die.
*He gestures dismissively*
The Master's work cannot be stopped.
The portal will open. The transcendence will be complete.
*He raises his hands, dark energy crackling*
You should have stayed in Redstone.

options.text: There's still time to stop this madness!

introduction: *He laughs coldly*
Madness? You call THIS madness?
I have seen TRUTH. I have touched POWER.
You are blind. All of you.
*The energy around him intensifies*
Enough words. Face your end.
*A tall figure in dark robes steps forward from the shadows*
*His eyes glow with unnatural light*
More fools come to—
*He stops mid-sentence as you pull out his journals*
*His expression flickers*
Where... where did you get those?

options.text: Knowledge serves life, not power. Remember?
Cassia gave them to me. She still believes in you.
Your past mistakes. They'll destroy you.

introduction: *He staggers back as if struck*
That... those words...
*His hands shake*
Cassia. Our... our promise.
*The glow in his eyes flickers, dims slightly*
No. NO. The Master showed me the truth.
Power is the only—
*He clutches his head*
But the journals... my work... before...

options.text: You wanted to HELP people, Marcus. Remember?
Cassia never stopped loving who you were.
You're weak. The cult made you weak.

introduction: *The name hits him like a physical blow*
Cassia...
*His voice breaks*
She... she kept them? After everything?
*The energy around him wavers*
I... I became something she would hate.
*He looks at his hands*
Something I hate.

options.text: It's not too late. You can still walk away.
She still loves you. The man you were.

introduction: *Tears stream down his face*
She... she still...?
*He falls to his knees*
After what I've done? What I've become?
*From behind him, the Shadow Priest shouts*
MARCUS! What are you doing? KILL THEM!
*Marcus doesn't move*
I can't... I can't undo this. Can't take back the blood.
*He looks up at you*
But I can stop adding to it.

options.text: Then run. Save yourself. Let her know you chose to live.

introduction: *He's frozen, memories warring with indoctrination*
Help people. Yes. That was... that was the purpose.
*He looks at the portal behind him, then at you*
But the Master... he promised transcendence. Power beyond—
*The Shadow Priest's voice booms*
ENOUGH! Marcus, destroy them NOW!
*Marcus's hands tremble*
I... I don't...

options.text: You can still walk away. Save yourself.
Decide NOW. With us or against us!

introduction: *He looks at you with desperate eyes*
Walk away? After everything?
*The Shadow Priest rages*
COWARD! I should have known you lacked conviction!
*Marcus looks at the priest, then back at you*
He's right. I am a coward.
*He stumbles backward toward a side passage*
But maybe... maybe cowardice can save what's left of my soul.
*He looks at you one last time*
Tell Cassia... tell her I'm sorry. For all of it.
*He turns and flees into the darkness*
*He nods slowly, tears still falling*
Run. Yes. That's all I'm good for now.
*The Shadow Priest screams in rage*
TRAITOR! WEAKLING! You were NOTHING without me!
*Marcus stands, voice steady for the first time*
You're right. I was nothing.
*He looks at you*
But I'd rather be nothing than be this.
*He turns and runs toward a side passage*
Tell her... tell her I remembered. In the end.
*He vanishes into the shadows*
*The flicker of humanity vanishes from his eyes*
You... you dare mock me?
*The dark energy surges back, stronger than before*
I am MORE than I ever was!
*He raises his hands*
I'll show you TRUE weakness!
*The Shadow Priest laughs*
Good, Marcus. Remember your training. End them.
*The pressure breaks him*
I... I can't face what I've done!
*He attacks desperately*
Better to die in battle than live with the shame!
*The Shadow Priest grins*
Excellent. Channel that despair, Marcus. Make them suffer.
*The Shadow Priest turns his full fury on you*
You dare turn my disciple against me?
He was MINE! His power was MINE!
*Dark energy swirls around him*
No matter. I'll end you myself. And then I'll hunt him down.
Now... DIE!
*Battle is joined*

IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.when_to_trigger: Before the final battle in Hill Ruins, check if player has 'marcus_journals' item
flow: IF player has marcus_journals → Start with 'journals_confrontation'
Player choices determine which combat encounter starts:
correct_path_to_make_marcus_flee: 2. Choose 'Knowledge serves life, not power' OR 'Cassia gave them to me'
3. Choose 'You wanted to HELP people' OR 'She still loves you' (if have cassia_final_words_for_marcus flag)
4. Choose 'Then run. Save yourself' OR 'You can still walk away'
Result: marcus_fled_battle flag set, only fight Shadow Priest
wrong_paths: Choose threatening/aggressive options → Marcus fights harder
Don't have journals → No special dialogue, standard fight
